test_list.name: Close Position
test_list.description:
When the user closes a position
Then The position is closed

test_list.name: Get Markets
test_list.description:
When a random user requests information about markets
Then the user receives information on the enabled markets

test_list.name: Open Position
test_list.description:
When the user opens a position
Then The position is opened

test_list.name: PreCreate
test_list.description:
When the user chooses some parameters
Then the user receives extend fee and liquidation price

test_list.name: Risk Coefficient
test_list.description:
When the user sets risk of coefficient
Then the user can see the appropriate minimum and maximum collateral amounts

test_list.name: Address Verification
test_list.description:
When an address is sent on a specific network
Then validation of address verification response is checked

test_list.name: Assign Address
test_list.description:
When an address is assigned
Then the signature verification is successful
